overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a medieval great hall rendered in a game engine, featuring a massive dragon skeleton suspended from vaulted ceilings above wooden dining tables. Natural light streams through tall gothic windows, illuminating the stone interior where several figures sit at tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with suspended skeleton display

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall interior from a fixed vantage point

notable_agents.action: group of figures seated at wooden table, appearing to dine or converse

entered.detail: massive bone structure of a dragon or sea creature hanging from ceiling beams with ribs and spine visible
three large arched windows with intricate tracery allowing bright natural light to enter
long rustic wooden tables with benches arranged in rows across the hall floor
elevated stone platform with staircase leading to upper level against the far wall
large circular iron chandelier suspended from ceiling with multiple candle holders
high ribbed vault ceiling with pointed arches and wooden beam supports

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand medieval hall with a massive dragon skeleton suspended from the vaulted ceiling. Natural light streams through tall gothic windows on the left, illuminating wooden dining tables where several figures are seated. The stone architecture features pointed arches, a balcony area visible in the background, and an iron chandelier hanging centrally.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic gaze into a grand medieval hall that emphasizes the scale of its gothic architecture and skeletal centerpiece. It begins with a wide view of the stone interior, where natural light streams through tall gothic windows to illuminate wooden dining tables and the figures seated around them. The perspective captures the massive dragon skeleton suspended from the vaulted ceiling, drawing the eye upward toward the pointed arches. The scene then encompasses the depth of the hall, revealing a distant balcony area and a central iron chandelier that anchors the vast space.
